statements.sql: select * from `job_translations` where `job_translations`.`job_id` = 18 and `job_translations`.`job_id` is not null
select `tags`.*, `job_tag`.`job_id` as `pivot_job_id`, `job_tag`.`tag_id` as `pivot_tag_id` from `tags` inner join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` where `job_tag`.`job_id` = 18
select distinct `tags`.* from `tags` left join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` where `tags`.`id` in (1, 2, 3)
select distinct `tags`.* from `tags` left join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` order by `tags`.`name` asc limit 50
